description: Package snapshot for Hub template maintainers. Sync when manifest.json changes.
notes: Do not add com.unity.ugui — UI Toolkit only.
UniRx is vendored under Assets/Plugins/UniRx (not in manifest).
Roslyn DLLs are vendored under Assets/Plugins/Roslyn for MCP execute_code (C# 12+).
Cinemachine is direct + via feature.characters-animation (intentional for broad template).
ProBuilder is direct in manifest + also via com.unity.feature.worldbuilding.
com.unity.cloud.gltfast enables MCP asset_gen GLB/GLTF import.
Strict VFX policy: VFX Graph + VisualEffect only; no new ParticleSystem in Assets/Game/.
Game.unity: cinematic main menu (UI Toolkit), GameSession + GameplayReveal lighting; SampleBurst VFX is reference-only (not menu-linked).
